name: Marinated Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 8 leaves of fresh basil, chopped (6 to 8)
recipeInstructions:
1 Combine all ingredients, except for the tomatoes, in a medium sized bowl.
2 Whisk until well blended.
3 Add tomatoes and toss lightly.
4 Cover and refrigerate for one hour or until ready to serve. Stir occasionally while marinating.
5 Place tomatoes in serving dish and pour marinade over them.
6 Makes 4 to 6 servings
7 Note: Best when fresh herbs are used!
